check.command: awk '$3 ~ /^(nfs|nfs4)$/ { ok=0; n=split($4, opts, ","); for (i=1; i<=n; i++) if (opts[i] == "noexec") ok=1; if (!ok) print }' /etc/fstab

candidate_check.description: The Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system must prevent binary files from being executed on file systems that are being imported via Network File System (NFS).

fix_text_excerpt: Configure the "/etc/fstab" to use the "noexec" option on file systems that are being imported via NFS.
title: The Red Hat Enterprise Linux operating system must prevent binary files from being executed on file systems that are being imported via Network File System (NFS).
